returns.zkVerified: Whether the most recent update was ZK-verified

getTier(uint16).details: Pure function — no state reads required.         Tier boundaries:           0 = Unverified  (score <  300)           1 = Bronze      (300 <= score < 600)           2 = Silver      (600 <= score < 800)           3 = Gold        (score >= 800)

getTokenId(address).details: Returns 0 if the wallet has never been minted a token         (token IDs start at 1).

returns._0: The token ID owned by `wallet`, or 0 if none

mintScore(address).details: Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Reverts if `to` already owns a token.

params.to: The wallet that will receive the soul-bound token

returns.tokenId: The token ID that was minted

updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool).details: Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Enforces a 24-hour cooldown between updates (CooldownNotExpired).

params.newScore: New raw credit score in the range [0, 1000]
params.tokenId: The token whose score should be updated
params.zkVerified: Whether this update is accompanied by a valid ZK proof

getScore(address).notice: Retrieve the current credit profile for a given wallet

getTier(uint16).notice: Derive the tier from an arbitrary score value

getTokenId(address).notice: Look up the token ID associated with a wallet

mintScore(address).notice: Mint a new credit-score NFT to `to`

updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool).notice: Update the credit score stored on an existing token
